email_templates.subject: Hey {{contact.first_name}}, got your message!

email_templates.name: Follow Up - Day 1
email_templates.subject: Following up - {{contact.first_name}}

email_templates.name: Follow Up - Day 3
email_templates.subject: Quick question, {{contact.first_name}}

email_templates.name: Follow Up - Day 7
email_templates.subject: Last follow up, {{contact.first_name}}

email_templates.name: Proposal Sent
email_templates.subject: Your proposal from {{custom_values.business_name}}

email_templates.name: Welcome New Client
email_templates.subject: Welcome to {{custom_values.business_name}}! Next Steps Inside
email_templates.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Welcome aboard! We are thrilled to have you.

Here is what happens next:
1. Kickoff meeting invite within 24 hours
2. Access to your client portal
3. Onboarding begins

Questions? Reply anytime.

Best,
{{user.first_name}}
{{custom_values.business_name}}

email_templates.name: Review Request
email_templates.subject: How was your experience, {{contact.first_name}}?
email_templates.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

We hope everything went smoothly! Could you take 60 seconds to leave us a review?

⭐ {{custom_values.website_url}}/reviews

Thank you!
{{user.first_name}}

email_templates.name: Re-engagement - 30 Days
email_templates.subject: Checking in, {{contact.first_name}}

sms_templates.name: Speed to Lead
sms_templates.body: Hi {{contact.first_name}}! We got your message and will be in touch right away. - {{custom_values.business_name}}. Reply STOP to opt out.

sms_templates.name: Follow Up Day 1
sms_templates.body: Hey {{contact.first_name}}, just checking in! Did you get a chance to review what we sent? Happy to answer questions. Reply STOP to opt out.

sms_templates.name: Appointment Reminder
sms_templates.body: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, reminder: you have a call scheduled for {{appointment.start_time}}. Looking forward to it! Reply STOP to opt out.

sms_templates.name: Appointment Confirmation
sms_templates.body: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, your appointment is confirmed! {{appointment.start_time}}. Add to calendar: {{appointment.google_calendar_link}}

sms_templates.name: Review Request
sms_templates.body: Hi {{contact.first_name}}, thank you for being a client! Would you leave us a quick review? {{custom_values.website_url}}/reviews. Reply STOP to opt out.

sms_templates.name: Re-engagement
sms_templates.body: Hey {{contact.first_name}}, it has been a while! We have new things that might help you. Worth a quick chat? Reply YES and we will reach out. Reply STOP to opt out.

calendars.name: Discovery Call
calendars.description: Quick 15-minute discovery call to learn about your needs

calendars.name: Kickoff Meeting
calendars.description: New client kickoff and onboarding session
